label: Strategy Trial Artifact Inspect
description: List artifacts attached to a Strategy Trial DAG node.

inputs.name: trial-id
inputs.description: Strategy Trial DAG node id whose artifacts should be listed.

outputs.name: trial_artifacts
outputs.description: Artifact refs linked to the trial, including local paths or object storage refs.

failureModes.description: The requested trial id is missing from strategy_trials.
The trial has no artifact for the evidence class required by the decision.

evidencePolicy: Artifact inspect evidence links Trial DAG identity to filesystem or object-store evidence.
A missing artifact usually creates a Knowledge or Infrastructure task before a promotion decision.
Do not infer strategy quality from an artifact index without reading the underlying artifact.
notes: Use this after `strategy_trial_inspect` when a decision depends on linked evidence.
